heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy, with a chance of rain/freezing showers. Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s. Light wind through the Connecticut River Valley and south, 20 to 25 mph gusts along the Champlain Valley and in the north.

heading: Saturday
text: A chance of localized rain or freezing rain in the morning, then some breaks of afternoon sun, with another chance of rain showers. Mild. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. South wind at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph, with gusts up to 40 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the Greens.

heading: Saturday Night
text: A good chance of widespread rain showers, with the occasional rumble of thunder north of Route 2. Lows in the 30s to low 40s. Winds turning to the southwest at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph then diminishing through the early morning.
